basic_details.job_title: CVC Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 06 Technical Examiner, Staff Car Driver and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Technical Examiner / Assistant Technical Examiner / Assistant Technical Examiner (Horticulture) / Staff Car Driver (Grade II)
basic_details.short_information: The Central Vigilance Commission (CVC) has released the official Technical Examiner / Assistant Technical Examiner / Assistant Technical Examiner (Horticulture) / Staff Car Driver (Grade II) Notification 2026 on 27-05-2026 and 21-05-2026 at cvc.gov.in. A total of 6 vacancies have been announced under the CVC Technical Examiner / Assistant Technical Examiner / Assistant Technical Examiner (Horticulture) / Staff Car Driver (Grade II) Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged up to 56 years with qualifications including Bachelors Degree in Engineering, Diploma in Engineering, and Trade Test for

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 56 years for all posts.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelors Degree in Engineering, Diploma in Engineering, Trade Test for Driver
qualification.details: Technical Examiner: Bachelors Degree in any branch of Engineering from a recognized University or Institute; Experience of handling contract execution in field or material management or public procurement or quality assurance or legal and policy issue related to procurement or compliance and vigilance in public procurement or contract management etc. Assistant Technical Examiner: Officers of the status of Assistant Engineers of the Government of India or Officers holding analogous post in State Government or Union Territories Offices having qualification and experience in Engineering/Diploma (Civil/Mechanical/Electrical/Materials Management). Assistant Technical Examiner (Horticulture): Officers of the status of Assistant Engineers (Horticulture) of the Engineering Department of the Government of India or Officers holding analogous post in State Government or Union Territories Offices. Staff Car Driver (Grade II): Have passed the trade test specified by the Government.

salary_details.details: Technical Examiner: Level 11 of the 7th CPC (Rs. 67700 – 208700/-) Assistant Technical Examiner: Level 7 of the 7th CPC (Rs. 44900 – 142400/-) Assistant Technical Examiner (Horticulture): Level 7 of the 7th CPC (Rs. 44900 – 142400/-) Staff Car Driver (Grade II): Level 4 of the 7th CPC (Rs. 25500 – 81100/-)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for CVC Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://cvc.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 21-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: CVC Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the CVC Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download CVC Technical Examiner, Assistant Technical Examiner Job 2026 Notification PDF Download CVC Staff Car Driver (Grade II) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: CVC Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Technical Examiner: Bachelors Degree in any branch of Engineering from a recognized University or Institute; Experience of handling contract execution in field or material management or public procurement or quality assurance or legal and policy issue related to procurement or compliance and vigilance in public procurement or contract management etc. Assistant Technical Examiner: Officers of the status of Assistant Engineers of the Government of India or Officers holding analogous post in State Government or Union Territories Offices having qualification and experience in Engineering/Diploma (Civil/Mechanical/Electrical/Materials Management). Assistant Technical Examiner (Horticulture): Officers of the status of Assistant Engineers (Horticulture) of the Engineering Department of the Government of India or Officers holding analogous post in State Government or Union Territories Offices. Staff Car Driver (Grade II): Have passed the trade test specified by the Government.

content_sections.heading: CVC Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 56 years for all posts.

content_sections.heading: CVC Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Technical Examiner: Level 11 of the 7th CPC (Rs. 67700 – 208700/-) Assistant Technical Examiner: Level 7 of the 7th CPC (Rs. 44900 – 142400/-) Assistant Technical Examiner (Horticulture): Level 7 of the 7th CPC (Rs. 44900 – 142400/-) Staff Car Driver (Grade II): Level 4 of the 7th CPC (Rs. 25500 – 81100/-)

rows.event: Last Date (approx: 45 days from publication for Driver)

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for CVC Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://cvc.gov.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 21-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CVC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the CVC Recruitment 2026 is 21st July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in the CVC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 6 vacancies available for the posts of Technical Examiner, Assistant Technical Examiner, Assistant Technical Examiner (Horticulture), and Staff Car Driver (Grade II).

faq.question: Q3. What is the mode of application for CVC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for CVC Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and send it to the specified address.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the CVC posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the posts under CVC Recruitment 2026 is 56 years.

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualifications required for the Technical Examiner post?
faq.answer: For the Technical Examiner post, a Bachelors Degree in any branch of Engineering from a recognized University or Institute is required, along with relevant experience.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Technical Examiner post?
faq.answer: The Assistant Technical Examiner post offers a salary in Level 7 of the 7th CPC, which ranges from Rs. 44900 to Rs. 142400/-.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for CVC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for CVC Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for CVC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process for CVC Recruitment 2026 includes Application Scrutiny and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for CVC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification for CVC Recruitment 2026 can be found on the official website of the Central Vigilance Commission and is also available in the Important Links section of this article.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of the Central Vigilance Commission?
faq.answer: The official website of the Central Vigilance Commission is https://cvc.gov.in. Candidates can visit this site for more information and to download the application form.
